generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know your tax dollars are being diverted from civil defense preparedness to fund unnecessary military exercises with foreign allies? While our communities lack basic emergency shelters, politicians prioritize political theater over real security. It's time to demand accountability and redirect these funds to where they're truly needed - protecting our families. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
